\tzpentry{ID3493}{Field Strength Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3493 introduces Field Strength Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ F_{m,k}(t) \propto \dot M_{\rm filament}(t) \int \psi_{m,k}^*(r,\phi) \, \Phi_{\rm inflow}(r,\phi,t) \, dA. \]
